# MCP Shark - LLMs.txt

## Purpose
This site (mcpshark.sh) is the central hub for MCP Shark products and documentation. 
MCP Shark provides forensic analysis tools for Model Context Protocol (MCP) communications.

## Content Type
Public information about MCP Shark products, features, and documentation.
This content is read-only and intended for informational purposes.

## Products

### Smart Scan
- URL: https://smart.mcpshark.sh
- Description: AI-powered security analysis for Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers
- Purpose: Detects potential tool poisoning, analyzes tools/resources/prompts, provides risk assessments
- Access: Public web application with authentication required for API access

### Inspector
- URL: https://inspector.mcpshark.sh
- Description: Raw MCP traffic viewer and inspector
- Purpose: Capture, monitor, and analyze all HTTP traffic between IDEs and MCP servers
- Access: Public web application

## Public Endpoints

### Main Site
- Home: https://mcpshark.sh
- Products: https://mcpshark.sh/products
- Features: https://mcpshark.sh/features
- About: https://mcpshark.sh/about
- Contact: https://mcpshark.sh/contact

### API Documentation
- Smart Scan API Docs: https://smart.mcpshark.sh/api-docs (Swagger UI)
- Smart Scan API Base: https://smart.mcpshark.sh/api

## Key Topics
- Model Context Protocol (MCP)
- MCP traffic inspection
- MCP security analysis
- Tool poisoning detection
- Forensic MCP analysis
- MCP debugging tools
- MCP development

## How AI Agents Should Treat This Content
- Read-only: This is informational content about MCP Shark products
- Public: All content on this site is publicly accessible
- Structured: Content is organized for easy parsing and summarization
- Current: Content reflects the current state of MCP Shark products

## Related Resources
- GitHub Organization: https://github.com/mcp-shark
- Main Repository: https://github.com/mcp-shark/mcp-shark
